Darius.trading_pattern: His bleed prevents your passive shield from recharging. Short Q trades to slow him and back off. Never stay in melee range during bleed ticks.
Darius.ability_to_dodge: Darius Q — stay outside the outer ring. Back off immediately when he chases with W to prevent bleed stacks.
Darius.early_game: Survive his early dominance. Your passive shield can't recharge under bleed. Farm and trade briefly with Q.
Darius.mid_game: You become tankier with items. His bleed matters less once you have Sunfire.
Darius.late_game: Your ult engage is more impactful in teamfights than his single-target pressure.
Darius.win_condition: Survive early bleeding. Build Plated Steelcaps to reduce bleed physical damage. Win through teamfight engage.
Darius.scaling: Darius wins early lane; Malphite better teamfight enabler
Darius.positioning: Short trades with Q to slow, then back off before bleed stacks. Don't let bleed prevent shield regen.

Garen.trading_pattern: His Q silence stops you from using Q to slow him. His E spins through your armor. He wins most trades pre-items. Farm and look for ult.
Garen.ability_to_dodge: Garen Q — when you see him sprint, Q him before he reaches you to slow him, then back off.
Garen.early_game: He out-trades you. Your passive shield helps but his Q stops your trading. Farm safely.
Garen.mid_game: You become tankier. His execute ult threatens you at low HP.
Garen.late_game: Your ult is a better teamfight tool. Group and engage.
Garen.win_condition: Farm and scale. Your ult is more valuable to the team than his. Win through macro.
Garen.scaling: Garen wins lane; Malphite better teamfight
Garen.positioning: Q him when he sprints to slow his approach. Trade briefly then back off.

Fiora.trading_pattern: She procs Vitals constantly and heals off them. Your armor reduces her physical damage somewhat but she has true damage. Never fight extended.
Fiora.ability_to_dodge: Fiora W (Riposte) — she Ripostes your ult. This is a massive problem in teamfights. Bait W before ult if possible.
Fiora.early_game: She trades through your armor with Vitals true damage. Farm defensively.
Fiora.mid_game: She wins all duels. Your value is in ult roaming.
Fiora.late_game: She can Riposte your ult — try to bait her W before ulting in teamfights.
Fiora.win_condition: Don't 1v1 her. Your value is as a teamfight initiator. Bait W before committing ult.
Fiora.scaling: Fiora wins lane; Malphite better teamfight
Fiora.positioning: Farm under tower. Your ult value comes from teamfights not lane.

Aatrox.trading_pattern: Your armor makes his physical Q damage weaker than against other champions. Q him to slow his advance and disengage. He can't stick to you easily.
Aatrox.ability_to_dodge: Aatrox Q — stand between his Q hitboxes. Your bulk means you can take some hits without losing much.
Aatrox.early_game: Armor vs his physical damage makes trades okay. Q to slow him, disengage.
Aatrox.mid_game: His healing becomes a problem. Bramble Vest helps.
Aatrox.late_game: Your ult engage is more valuable than his kit. Group and roam.
Aatrox.win_condition: Farm and build Bramble Vest. Your ult into a teamfight is more impactful than his lane pressure.
Aatrox.scaling: Even; Malphite better teamfight, Aatrox better split push
Aatrox.positioning: Stand between his Q zones. Q to slow and disengage.

Camille.trading_pattern: Her true damage in E bypasses your armor entirely. She wins all trades. Farm and look for ult opportunities on other lanes.
Camille.ability_to_dodge: Camille E (Hookshot) — stay away from walls. Her E requires wall geometry.
Camille.early_game: She wins with true damage. Farm defensively.
Camille.mid_game: Shove and roam with ult. Don't fight 1v1.
Camille.late_game: Your ult engage is your value. Group and win through it.
Camille.win_condition: Survive and roam with ult. Never fight 1v1.
Camille.scaling: Camille outscales in duels; Malphite better teamfight initiator
Camille.positioning: Center of lane away from walls. Farm and look for ult windows on other lanes.

Irelia.trading_pattern: Her Q resets avoid your passive shield replenishment easily. Your W reduces her attack speed which slows her stacks somewhat.
Irelia.ability_to_dodge: Irelia E (Flawless Duet) — sidestep the stun blades.
Irelia.early_game: She bullies you. Your W reduces her attack speed.
Irelia.mid_game: Her Trinity and maxed stacks outpace your armor stacking.
Irelia.late_game: Your ult is far more valuable. Group and engage.
Irelia.win_condition: Use W to reduce her attack speed (slows passive stacks). Roam with ult.
Irelia.scaling: Irelia wins lane; Malphite better teamfight
Irelia.positioning: Activate W when she Q chains onto you. Sidestep E blades.

Jax.trading_pattern: His E dodges your auto-attacks. Your Q slow is your best tool. He wins extended fights significantly with mixed damage.
Jax.ability_to_dodge: Jax E (Counterstrike) — don't autoattack while spinning. Your Q poke still works through his E.
Jax.early_game: He beats you. Use Q to poke and disengage.
Jax.mid_game: He wins all 1v1s. Shove and roam with ult.
Jax.late_game: Your ult engage is better than his kit in teamfights.
Jax.win_condition: Q to slow and disengage. Roam with ult. Win through teamfight engage.
Jax.scaling: Jax wins lane; Malphite better teamfight
Jax.positioning: Q him to slow, then back off. Don't auto during his E.

Jayce.trading_pattern: He pokes you from cannon range. Your passive shield absorbs some. Use Q to slow him when he walks up to melee CS.
Jayce.ability_to_dodge: Jayce Q (Shock Blast) — sidestep the cannon arc shot.
Jayce.early_game: He pokes your shield down. Q him during melee CS attempts.
Jayce.mid_game: Your armor reduces his physical poke. He'll roam — push and teleport.
Jayce.late_game: Your ult is more valuable in teamfights than his poke.
Jayce.win_condition: Passive shield tanks some poke. Build armor items. Win through ult teamfight engage.
Jayce.scaling: Jayce wins early; Malphite better teamfight
Jayce.positioning: Q him when he's in melee form. Sidestep cannon Q arcs.

Kayle.trading_pattern: Abuse her early before level 6. Your armor makes her pre-11 physical damage weak. Q her whenever she walks up.
Kayle.ability_to_dodge: Kayle E (Starfire Spellblade) — sidestep her ranged empowered auto at later levels.
Kayle.early_game: You bully her. She's weak melee against your armor.
Kayle.mid_game: At 11 she becomes ranged. Your armor matters less against her magic E.
Kayle.late_game: Both are teamfight tools. Your ult engage vs her sustained DPS.
Kayle.win_condition: Build early CS lead. At level 11 she threatens — group for ult engage value.
Kayle.positioning: Stay on top of her early. After level 11 maintain distance or group.

Mordekaiser.trading_pattern: His ult removes your passive shield and ult — both of your main tools are inaccessible in his realm. He wins 1v1 inside the realm.
Mordekaiser.ability_to_dodge: Mordekaiser R (Realm of Death) — you can't escape it. Fight back with Q slow and auto-attacks inside the realm.
Mordekaiser.early_game: He wins early. Short trades with Q.
Mordekaiser.mid_game: His ult negates your ult in 1v1. Very hard lane.
Mordekaiser.late_game: In teamfights without his ult available, your ult engage is stronger.
Mordekaiser.win_condition: Survive and play for teamfight ult engage. Track his ult CD — fight when it's down.
Mordekaiser.scaling: Mordekaiser wins lane; Malphite better multi-target teamfight
Mordekaiser.positioning: Don't fight inside his W passive ring. Use Q to slow him and disengage.

Nasus.trading_pattern: Q him every time he goes for Q stacks. He can't respond. Your passive shield recharges freely since he has no bleed. Bully him off every CS.
Nasus.ability_to_dodge: Nasus W (Wither) — Q him back before he can Wither you, or just disengage immediately.
Nasus.early_game: Free bully lane. Deny every Q stack with Q poke.
Nasus.mid_game: His stacks accumulate. Build and roam with ult.
Nasus.late_game: 500 stacks — Wither makes your Q slow less impactful. Group fight.
Nasus.win_condition: Deny stacks. Build early lead. Your ult teamfight engage wins games.
Nasus.scaling: Malphite wins early; Nasus threatens past 400 stacks
Nasus.positioning: Step between him and his Q CS target. Q poke every stack attempt.

Olaf.trading_pattern: He wins the physical trade war. Your armor helps but his Q axes hurt at range. His ult makes your CC useless in extended fights.
Olaf.ability_to_dodge: Olaf Q (Undertow) — sidestep the axe. Your passive makes you tanky but he deals consistent damage.
Olaf.early_game: He out-trades you. Farm and survive.
Olaf.mid_game: His ult denies your Q slow and W attack speed reduction. Hard matchup.
Olaf.late_game: Your ult engage in teamfights is still strong. Your ult doesn't CC him during Ragnarok but it targets others.
Olaf.win_condition: Farm and roam with ult. Don't fight him 1v1 when his ult is available. Engage on other targets in teamfights.
Olaf.scaling: Olaf outscales in 1v1; Malphite better multi-target teamfight
Olaf.positioning: Dodge his axe. Q to slow when he's out of ult. Disengage when ult activates.

Renekton.trading_pattern: He burst-combos you before your passive shield can help. Short trades with Q after dodging his W. His burst is front-loaded.
Renekton.ability_to_dodge: Renekton W (Ruthless Predator) — the stun is the critical part. Don't trade into his E dash unless your shield is full.
Renekton.early_game: He wins early. Passive shield helps absorb some burst but his combo chunks through it.
Renekton.mid_game: He falls off mid-game. Your armor scaling becomes more relevant.
Renekton.late_game: Your ult is stronger in teamfights. Group.
Renekton.win_condition: Survive early, scale. Your teamfight ult is worth much more than his lane bully kit.
Renekton.scaling: Renekton wins early; Malphite better teamfight
Renekton.positioning: Let passive shield recharge between trades. Q him after he uses E-W combo.

Riven.trading_pattern: Her burst combo kills you quickly. Your armor helps but she has too much sustained damage in her combo. Q to slow her and disengage.
Riven.ability_to_dodge: Riven E (Valor) — she uses shield before engaging. Q after her E to slow her retreat.
Riven.early_game: She out-trades you. Q slow and disengage.
Riven.mid_game: Her full combo destroys you even with armor. Shove and roam with ult.
Riven.late_game: Your ult is more impactful. Group.
Riven.win_condition: Survive and roam with ult. Don't 1v1 her.
Riven.scaling: Riven wins lane; Malphite better teamfight
Riven.positioning: Q her to slow when she engages. Back off and let passive shield recharge.

Sett.trading_pattern: His grit accumulates from taking damage — you can't trade freely without feeding his W. Short Q trades and disengage before he builds grit.
Sett.ability_to_dodge: Sett W (Haymaker) — sidestep the true damage center when he throws it.
Sett.early_game: Even. Short Q trades. Don't let him auto-attack you too freely.
Sett.mid_game: You become tankier with items. His grit W hurts through armor.
Sett.late_game: Both are teamfight initiators. Your ult engage vs his ult grab.
Sett.win_condition: Farm and scale. Your ult is generally more impactful in 5v5 engages. Trade Q for Q.
Sett.scaling: Even; Malphite better multi-target engage late
Sett.positioning: Sidestep his W center. Q him when he walks up for CS.

Shen.trading_pattern: His W blocks your autos but not your Q. Q poke to slow him. His energy-based kit means he doesn't run out of resources like mana.
Shen.ability_to_dodge: Shen W (Spirit's Refuge) — stop autoattacking when active. Use Q poke instead since it's not a basic attack.
Shen.early_game: Even trading. Q poke is your main tool. His W blocks autos.
Shen.mid_game: Both want to roam with ults. Track his ult and counter-rotate.
Shen.late_game: Both are great teamfight initiators. Coordinate with your team.
Shen.win_condition: Trade Q poke. Push and force him to choose between ulting elsewhere and losing CS.
Shen.positioning: Q poke when he walks up. Stop autos when W activates.

Sion.trading_pattern: Interrupt his Q charge with your Q slow. He's immobile and can't stop your passive shield regeneration. Trade freely.
Sion.ability_to_dodge: Sion Q (Decimating Smash) — Q him as he charges to slow and close gap. Move perpendicular to avoid knockup.
Sion.early_game: You bully him. Q slow into trades freely.
Sion.mid_game: His HP stacks make him tankier. Your armor reduces his damage.
Sion.late_game: Both are teamfight frontliners. Your ult is faster and more reliable as an engage.
Sion.win_condition: Bully him and deny HP stacks. Roam with ult to win the map.
Sion.positioning: Q him when he charges to slow and close gap simultaneously.

Trundle.trading_pattern: His ult steals your armor and MR — losing resistances while he gains them is devastating for a tank. Avoid 1v1 with his ult available.
Trundle.ability_to_dodge: Trundle E (Pillar of Ice) — sidestep it. Don't let it cut off your escape path.
Trundle.early_game: You win early. Bully him and deny CS.
Trundle.mid_game: His ult stealing your resistances is a massive problem. Avoid 1v1.
Trundle.late_game: In teamfights, don't be the target of his ult. Group and engage on others.
Trundle.win_condition: Build large early lead. In teamfights, engage before he can target you with his ult. Force him to waste it on someone else.
Trundle.scaling: Malphite wins early; Trundle's ult limits mid-late 1v1
Trundle.positioning: Engage with ult on other targets in teamfights to avoid being his ult target.

Tryndamere.trading_pattern: Q him when he approaches — the slow makes his Spinning Slash follow-up weaker. Your armor reduces his physical crit damage significantly.
Tryndamere.ability_to_dodge: Tryndamere E (Spinning Slash) — Q before he uses E to slow him, making the gap close less effective.
Tryndamere.early_game: You win early. Q to slow his approach. Your armor halves his crit damage.
Tryndamere.mid_game: His crits become more threatening but your armor reduces them.
Tryndamere.late_game: His ult prevents kills for 5 seconds. Wait it out. Your ult on multiple targets is better.
Tryndamere.win_condition: Build early lead. Q slow reduces his crit effectiveness. Never commit to kill during his ult.
Tryndamere.positioning: Q him before he uses E so he arrives slow. Randuin's Omen active reduces his crit damage.

Urgot.trading_pattern: His shotgun knees shred even with armor. His W passive pops through your passive shield. Very hard to trade favorably.
Urgot.ability_to_dodge: Urgot W (Purge) — angle to reduce knee procs. Don't stand directly in front of his active knees.
Urgot.early_game: He beats you. Farm and survive.
Urgot.mid_game: He dominates. Shove and roam with ult.
Urgot.late_game: Your ult engage in teamfights is more valuable.
Urgot.win_condition: Roam with ult. Don't fight him 1v1. Win through team engage.
Urgot.scaling: Urgot outscales in 1v1; Malphite better multi-target teamfight
Urgot.positioning: Angle away from his knee direction. Q to slow and disengage when he gets close.

Vayne.trading_pattern: Kill her before Guinsoo's. Your armor is useless against her Silver Bolts true damage. She hard counters your tank build.
Vayne.ability_to_dodge: Vayne E (Condemn) — never stand near walls. Her stun is devastating.
Vayne.early_game: You win early — bully her. Force kills before items.
Vayne.mid_game: Her Silver Bolts ignore your entire armor stack. Avoid 1v1.
Vayne.late_game: She counters tank building fundamentally. Engage with ult but don't fight her alone.
Vayne.win_condition: Kill her early and get a lead. After Guinsoo's you fundamentally lose 1v1.
Vayne.scaling: Malphite wins very early; Vayne hard outscales vs tanks
Vayne.positioning: Never stand near walls. Bully early before her items arrive.

Varus.trading_pattern: He pokes from extreme range. Your passive shield absorbs some Q shots but his consistent W blight poke drains you. Q him when he's within range.
Varus.ability_to_dodge: Varus Q (Piercing Arrow) — sidestep the slow projectile. Move laterally.
Varus.early_game: He pokes you down from range. Q him when he approaches.
Varus.mid_game: His W true damage ignores armor. Very difficult matchup.
Varus.late_game: Your ult engage is still valuable. Group and engage on carries.
Varus.win_condition: Roam with ult and create team leads. You can't win side lane — use your ult value.
Varus.scaling: Varus outscales; Malphite better teamfight initiator
Varus.positioning: Sidestep his Q. Q him when he walks up for CS.

Yasuo.trading_pattern: He blocks your Q with Wind Wall. Your Q is your primary tool — losing it to Wind Wall hurts. Use Q from angles where Wind Wall can't cover.
Yasuo.ability_to_dodge: Yasuo W (Wind Wall) — throw Q from sideways angles he can't block easily. His Wind Wall placement matters.

power_spikes.you: Level 6 (ult, combo with Yasuo's airborne for free R), Sunfire

Yasuo.early_game: Even. He can block Q with Wind Wall.
Yasuo.mid_game: Your ult knocks up — a free Yasuo ult target. Coordinate with him if he's ally.
Yasuo.late_game: Even in direct fights. Your ult is more impactful in 5v5.
Yasuo.win_condition: Throw Q from angles his Wind Wall can't block. Your ult knocks up — devastating setup.
Yasuo.scaling: Even; both have good teamfight tools
Yasuo.positioning: Approach from the side so his Wind Wall placement is less effective against your Q.

Yone.trading_pattern: His E dash gets through your tank stats eventually. Your armor reduces his physical damage component but his kit has mixed damage.
Yone.ability_to_dodge: Yone E (Soul Unbound) — Q him when he dashes forward to slow him. Back off before his body returns.

power_spikes.you: Level 6 (ult, knocks up — combo with his ult), Sunfire

Yone.early_game: Even early. Q him when he E's forward.
Yone.mid_game: His damage ramps. Your armor helps with physical component.
Yone.late_game: Your ult knockup combined with his ult is devastating. Your ult is the better teamfight tool.
Yone.win_condition: Build armor and trade Q pokes. Your ult knockup is a great setup for his ult if allied.
Yone.scaling: Even; Malphite better pure teamfight initiator
Yone.positioning: Q him when he uses E forward. Back off before his return.

Yorick.trading_pattern: Q him whenever he goes for CS. Your passive shield recharges fine since his damage isn't bleed. Bully him early.
Yorick.ability_to_dodge: Yorick E (Mourning Mist) — sidestep it. Being marked causes Maiden focus.
Yorick.early_game: You win early. Q poke and deny CS.
Yorick.mid_game: His Maiden + Hullbreaker makes him a split push threat. Match or let team play.
Yorick.late_game: Group for ult engage. Yorick will split — respond accordingly.
Yorick.win_condition: Build early lead, deny Maiden charges, roam with ult.
Yorick.scaling: Malphite wins early; Yorick better split pusher
Yorick.positioning: Q poke between him and his CS target. Sidestep E.
